metadata.description: Bring up the auth stack (keycloak-service + keycloak-store-postgres + keycloak-mailpit). Run `node scripts/gen-dev-secrets.mjs` first (mints auth.env). Add --args=--profile=vault to include vault-service (prod posture).

Bring up the mcm stack test infra + mc-service (--profile app). Run `node scripts/gen-dev-secrets.mjs` first (mints mcm.env). Bring up auth first (manual ordering). Add bff-nonsecure / bff-secure / agents via docker compose --profile.

Bring up the AI agent layer under the mcm compose stack (HEAVY variant: gateway + 3 MCP + movie-assistant-store-postgres checkpointer). Fetches the agent-gateway Keycloak client secret and injects it so tool calls work. Prereqs: up-auth + up-mcm + host Ollama. Distinct from up-agents-prod (the light docker-run/MemorySaver E2E variant).
Bring up the audit stack (agent-audit-opensearch append-only sink). Run `node scripts/gen-dev-secrets.mjs` first (mints audit.env).
Bring up the observability stack (LangFuse + otel-lgtm + opa-service + unleash-service). Run `node scripts/gen-dev-secrets.mjs` first (mints observability.env).
Convenience: bring up auth (Keycloak) then the mcm app stack in order (auth before mc-service, FR-006).

options.command: docker compose -p mcm -f infrastructure-as-code/docker/stacks/mcm.compose.yaml --env-file infrastructure-as-code/docker/stacks/mcm.env --profile app --profile bff-nonsecure --profile bff-secure --profile agents --profile agents-metro down

commands: docker compose -p mcm -f infrastructure-as-code/docker/stacks/mcm.compose.yaml --env-file infrastructure-as-code/docker/stacks/mcm.env --profile app --profile bff-nonsecure --profile bff-secure --profile agents --profile agents-metro down

metadata.description: Tear down all four stacks (keeps external volumes).
Deploy the containerized production-node agent stack (gateway + movie-mcp + web-api-mcp; host Ollama, MemorySaver) for local agent E2E. Pass --args=--build to force-rebuild images.
Remove the containerized production-node agent stack (gateway + movie-mcp + web-api-mcp).

Static resource-naming gate (features 019 + 020): assert every Docker volume/network name, and every container_name == service key == convention. Pass --args=--section=volumes|networks|containers|ollama|all (default all).

Static inline-secret gate (feature 021): assert no tracked compose file holds a clear-text credential — every secret-shaped key / password URL / auth literal must be a ${VAR} reference. Pass --args=--selftest to validate the detector.

Run the OWASP ZAP DAST baseline (non-destructive: spider + passive) against the local stack, authenticated as the E2E test user. Reports → security/zap/reports/. Prereqs: auth + mcm stacks up (add --profile agents for the gateway target). Pass --args='--mode full' + DAST_ALLOW_ACTIVE=1 for the destructive active scan (disposable stacks only, FR-017). See docs/runbooks/dast-scanning.md.
